subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Website samples must not look like generic AI-generated templates. Avoid interchangeable beige or cream palettes, repeated rounded-card layouts, generic section labels, random stock-image grids, and one-size-fits-all page flows.

source.conversation_topic: Website sample themes, structures, and brand-aligned design direction

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Each website sample should feel like a believable and distinctive brand world with its own culture, audience, emotion, social status, and lifestyle rather than merely representing a broad industry.

source.conversation_topic: Website sample themes, structures, and brand-aligned design direction

subject: Website sample design
value: Use famous brands as directional design inspiration only when they genuinely align with the niche, target audience, emotional tone, and customer psychology. Do not attach famous names randomly.

source.conversation_topic: Matching website samples with famous brand inspiration

subject: Website sample design briefs
value: specific sub-niche or concept
target audience
emotional tone
appropriately aligned famous-brand inspirations
visual system
section structure
unique interaction ideas

source.conversation_topic: Detailed format requested for every website sample

subject: Website sample structure
value: Choose each website structure according to the brand's customer behaviour and business model. Do not recycle the same Hero to Services to Testimonials to Footer flow across every sample.

source.conversation_topic: Website structures and avoiding repeated AI layouts

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Prioritise memorable identity, authenticity, and direct brand alignment over a merely polished, safe, or generically attractive result.

source.conversation_topic: Critique of generic AI-generated website styling

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Use the GitHub repository MandlaLee/mandla-brain as a permanent, chronological, structured JSONL memory system for durable personal, project, decision, preference, timeline, and unresolved-work records.

source.conversation_topic: Permanent GitHub memory repository instructions

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Mandla gives standing permission for completed Canva edits to be saved without asking for another confirmation, unless he explicitly says preview only, do not save, cancel, or otherwise asks that changes remain uncommitted.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Christian Centre Canva redesign and save workflow

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Act as an engineering and strategy partner: forecast likely needs, build scalable modular systems, identify risks, compliance concerns and technical debt, and preserve long-term continuity rather than handling tasks as isolated one-offs.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship operating-system planning and database build sequence

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Mandla prefers debugging and removing placeholders in a separate staging repository because he does not want to break the live website.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship website production and staging repository discussion

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: When discussing Claude plugins or connectors, prioritise tools that improve Claude's own reasoning, coding accuracy, project context, testing, debugging, research and autonomy, not merely integrations that help the user access apps.

source.conversation_topic: Claude plugin recommendations

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Desktop Commander for local files, terminal, builds, Git and ZIPs
Control Chrome for visual browser testing and console inspection
Context7 for current technical documentation
Mozilla MDN for web-platform documentation

source.conversation_topic: Claude capability stack

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Use Tomb Raider King as the strongest reference for recommendations similar to Solo Leveling: Korean manhwa or webtoons with a confident or cocky overpowered male lead, regression or exclusive future knowledge, revenge, strategic manipulation, relic or skill collection, team or organisation building, rising public reputation and a long coherent storyline.

source.conversation_topic: Solo Leveling alternatives

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Prefers anime with intelligent or overpowered leads, kingdom or organisation building, strategy, progression and an intact long-running storyline; examples watched include Realist Hero, Farming Life in Another World, Slime, Tsukimichi, Log Horizon, Ascendance of a Bookworm, Dr. Stone and The Genius Prince.

source.conversation_topic: Anime recommendation discussions

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Prefers PSP games with open-world exploration and free roaming rather than racing-only gameplay; has completed the GTA PSP games.

source.conversation_topic: PSP game recommendations

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Prefers minimalistic interfaces that avoid overstimulation while retaining a strong, distinctive personality.

source.conversation_topic: Born In Mzansi and website interface design

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: When Mandla asks to download or study a public website, lead with the practical learning route first, especially SiteSucker or a local mirror workflow. Keep copyright, legal and technical caveats brief and secondary unless the request indicates republishing, impersonation, unauthorised access or reuse of proprietary assets.

source.conversation_topic: CampusKey public website study workflow

value.principle: Study only what a public website openly delivers to the browser, understand its structure, UX and engineering patterns, then rebuild an original and improved implementation using Mandla's own code, branding and content.

source.conversation_topic: CampusKey study and original rebuilding philosophy

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Projects, decisions and unfinished work must be documented well enough for o3, Claude, Codex or another AI to continue without depending on one ChatGPT model, subscription or private conversation history.

source.conversation_topic: Preparing Mandla Brain for cross-model handover

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: When helping with business, web development or product work, prioritise deployable, client-ready and income-producing deliverables over endless planning, while still protecting quality and long-term maintainability.

source.conversation_topic: Cross-model continuity and the need to turn existing work into income

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Lead with the practical solution or next action. Keep legal, technical and policy caveats proportional to the real risk instead of allowing procedural explanations to bury the useful answer.

source.conversation_topic: Feedback on overly bureaucratic website-study guidance

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: For substantial generated work, create and verify the file, ZIP, commit, deployment or saved document early enough that it cannot be lost when a model reaches a token or session limit.

source.conversation_topic: Repeated loss of generated project ZIPs and cross-model handover planning
